'''Jolla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He was allied with [[Torga]].
